mapper.sql: A.SITE_ID AS siteId , A.SITE_NM AS siteNm , A.SITE_URL AS siteUrl , A.SITE_DC AS siteDc , A.SITE_THEMA_CL_CODE AS siteThemaClCode , A.ACTVTY_AT AS actvtyAt , (CASE A.ACTVTY_AT WHEN 'Y' THEN '활성' ELSE '비활성' END) AS actvtyAtNm , A.USE_AT AS useAt , (CASE A.USE_AT WHEN 'Y' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END) AS useAtNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_SITE_LIST A WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.SITE_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SITE_LIST A WHERE 1 = 1
